information: The predecessor of Ho Chi Minh City University of Industry was Go Vap Vocational School founded by Don Bosco monks on November 11, 1956 in Hanh Thong commune, Go Vap District, Gia Dinh Province.
Label: Giới thiệu

information: In 1968, the school was renamed Don Bosco First Technical High School. On January 31, 1970, the school was converted into a private Don Bosco Secondary Technical High School, referred to as Don Bosco Technical High School for short. After the day of peace and unification of the country, the Southern Liberation Army took over and on December 19, 1975, the School was handed over to the General Department of Metallurgy and Electronics.
Label: Giới thiệu

information: In 1978, the School was renamed the School of Technical Workers IV under the Ministry of Mechanical and Metallurgy. In 1994, the school merged with Chemical High School II in Bien Hoa city to become Industrial Technical High School IV, directly under the Ministry of Industry.
Label: Giới thiệu

information: In March 1999, the School was upgraded to Industrial College IV and in December 2004, the School was upgraded to Industrial University of Ho Chi Minh City according to Decision No. 214/2004/QD - TTg of the Prime Minister and the School was approved by the Prime Minister to pilot innovation of the operating mechanism for the period 2015-2017 according to Decision No. 902/QD-TTg dated June 23, 2015, starting from the 2015 - 2016 school year.
Label: Giới thiệu

information: Head office at No. 12 Nguyen Van Bao, Hanh Thong Ward, Ho Chi Minh City. Phone: (028) 3894 0390. Website: www.iuh.edu.vn. Email: Ho Chi Minh City University of Industry: dhcn@iuh.edu.vn, Organization - Administration Department: ptchc@iuh.edu.vn, Finance - Accounting Department: ptckt@iuh.edu.vn, Training Department: phongdaotao@iuh.edu.vn, Admissions Department: tuyensinh@iuh.edu.vn
Label: Giới thiệu

information: In addition to the headquarters, the school has Quang Ngai Campus (No. 938 Quang Trung Street), Thanh Hoa Campus (Quang Phu Ward), Pham Van Chieu Campus (Go Vap District, Ho Chi Minh City), Nguyen Van Dung Campus (Go Vap District, Ho Chi Minh City) and Nhon Trach Campus (Dong Nai)
Label: Giới thiệu

information: Quang Ngai branch is located at No. 938 Quang Trung street, Cam Thanh ward, Quang Ngai province. Phone: (0255) 2222 135 or (0255) 3250 075. Website: www.qn.iuh.edu.vn
Label: Giới thiệu

information: Rector's Message "By constantly innovating and improving the quality of education, as well as improving facilities for learning, research and extracurricular activities, IUH is confident to be a reliable educational institution for you to continue your learning journey. We are proud of the values ​​that the school brings to students and the community."
Label: Giới thiệu

information: The school's vision is to become Vietnam's leading university, a pioneer in the fields of education and applied research, technology transfer and innovation.
Label: Giới thiệu

information: Becoming a leading university in Vietnam: ranked in the top 10 universities in the country
Label: Giới thiệu

information: Pioneer in the field of education and applied research: training programs have an application-oriented approach, meeting the practical requirements of society
Label: Giới thiệu

information: Technology transfer and innovation: developing new ideas, improvements and creativity in the fields of technology transfer, business incubation, cooperation and commercialization of scientific products.
Label: Giới thiệu

information: Providing high quality human resources: with qualified professional qualifications, meeting the practical requirements of society, with creative thinking capacity and entrepreneurship capacity
Label: Giới thiệu

information: Human resources for international integration: able to adapt in the international environment; Have knowledge of foreign languages ​​and information technology to quickly access knowledge and modern technology in the region and the world
Label: Giới thiệu

information: Human resources contribute to the country's development: high-quality human resources will increase labor productivity, meeting the requirements of domestic and international markets; enrich intellectual and economic life as well as professional activities, through community services and contribute to the socio-economic development of the country.
Label: Giới thiệu

information: The strategic goal is to build modern management technology, basically complete the conditions to meet the requirements of training high-quality human resources to contribute to society, create practical and effective value from scientific research and technology transfer activities, and international cooperation.
Label: Giới thiệu

information: The strategic goal is to pioneer in the fields of education, research and technology transfer; promote connection to serve the community; create a learning and working environment that attracts competent and highly qualified learners and lecturers; sustainable development on the basis of financial autonomy.
Label: Giới thiệu

information: Pioneering in the fields of education, research and technology transfer: increasing the quality of graduates; improve employment and job placement rates for learners after graduation; enhance internationalization of training programs; improve the quality of training programs to meet the requirements of quality assurance organizations; strengthen cooperation with organizations in recruiting graduates; increase the quality of research works published domestically and internationally; Implement policies to support domestic and international research cooperation; promote technology transfer activities.
Label: Giới thiệu

information: Promote community service connection: expand active citizen activities in community connection; promote start-up activities; Encourage learners, officials and workers to participate in community service activities; exploit the media effectively; develop the capacity of the media team.
Label: Giới thiệu

information: Building modern educational facilities: developing infrastructure for teaching and research activities; create many exciting extracurricular activities right on the school campus; building a green campus and advanced information technology infrastructure; develop an effective online learning system.
Label: Giới thiệu

information: Attract high quality resources at home and abroad: maintain a team of qualified lecturers; have appropriate remuneration mechanisms; recruiting and searching for high quality personnel; diversify recruitment forms; enhance human resource capacity development; make appropriate work arrangements; improve working environment; Increase the income of officials and workers.
Label: Giới thiệu

information: Stable, sustainable investment and income: increase revenue through training, research and other resources; Reasonable investment in human resources, training and research, community service activities and improving the quality of life of learners; maintain reserves; Increase budget for the plan to ensure continuous operations.
Label: Giới thiệu

information: The core value is that with the goal and vision of becoming one of the leading universities in Vietnam, pioneering in education, applied research, technology transfer and innovation, Ho Chi Minh City University of Industry identifies and summarizes the core value system: "Innovation - Solidarity - Humanity".
Label: Giới thiệu

information: Innovation: constantly looking for new and better ways of doing things, being creative, innovating and daring to think and do to try new things and create opportunities to improve and reach new heights.
Label: Giới thiệu

information: Solidarity: taking responsibility and ownership, and working collaboratively with all units and stakeholders to fully exploit resources and capabilities and use and deploy them effectively.
Label: Giới thiệu

information: Humanity: treating each individual and group with compassion, altruism, fairness, justice and aiming to develop potential and realize aspirations; work professionally and ethically and serve and contribute to the community as a responsible citizen.
Label: Giới thiệu

information: Facilities The school has over 500 spacious and airy lecture halls and classrooms, over 350 laboratories and practice workshops with modern equipment, and boarding areas that can accommodate 8,000 people.
Label: Giới thiệu

information: The student cafeteria is built modernly and spaciously, students can choose dishes to suit their preferences and budget in a self-service style to integrate with modern lifestyle.
Label: Giới thiệu

information: The library currently has over 200,000 copies of books of all kinds.
Label: Giới thiệu

information: The school has completely and extensively computerized all activities in the school. Students can access the internet and use the network to search for electronic library information to serve their studies. All communication with teachers and searching for information about the faculty, school, etc., students can search online.
Label: Giới thiệu

information: Canteens, student dormitories, traditional houses, multi-purpose gyms, electronic libraries, internship systems, laboratories, classrooms, and lecture halls are increasingly being completed according to international standards. Information technology facilities in schools are networked and internet connections will be increasingly widely used.
Label: Giới thiệu

information: Facilities at the school include the Practice Laboratory of the Faculty of Information Technology, the Simulation Center of the Institute of Finance and Accounting, the Simulation Center of the Faculty of Business Administration, the Smart Factory Laboratory for Industry 4.0 Applications, the Library Center, and the Student Dormitory Room.
Label: Giới thiệu

information: ​The school aims to train learners to become people with full CARE qualities, in accordance with the vision, mission and core values ​​of the School. The learner qualities that Ho Chi Minh City University of Industry wants learners to achieve during their study at the University.
Label: Giới thiệu

information: Avid Lifelong Learner - an active continuous learner: Has curiosity, eagerness to learn and lifelong learning spirit; Have an open mind and be receptive to new ideas, concepts, and knowledge;
Label: Giới thiệu

information: Rational Thinker - a person who thinks clearly and rationally: Has critical thinking in analyzing facts and options before making judgments; Analyze and solve problems in a logical and systematic manner.
Label: Giới thiệu

information: Enterprising Innovator - an innovator in business activities: Has thinking and resourcefulness in business; Have creativity and innovation in generating ideas and solving real-life problems; Identify opportunities and accept controllable risks.
Label: Giới thiệu

information: The educational philosophy of Ho Chi Minh City University of Industry aims to foster learners with CARE qualities, preparing learners to enter life and the world of work in the future. This philosophy helps train learners to apply and improve knowledge through practical experience, active learning and applied research to meet the needs of stakeholders and society.
Label: Giới thiệu

information: The Ho Chi Minh City University of Industry community lives in transforming thinking and enriching the intellectual - economic life and professional activities of learners and stakeholders by serving the community and contributing to the progress of society
Label: Giới thiệu

information: CARE qualities: fostering learners to become compassionate leaders, always showing a eagerness to learn, people with strict logical thinking and breakthrough initiatives at work
Label: Giới thiệu

information: Apply and enhance knowledge: training programs are designed to ensure relevance and update, considering the development trends of the professions and the needs of stakeholders, using a training model based on output standards to meet national, regional and international quality assurance standards.
Label: Giới thiệu

information: Prepare for life and the future of work: enabling learners to engage in real-world environments and the world of work through internships, projects, applied research, experiments, active learning and community service. Equip learners with necessary skills such as critical thinking, creative thinking, innovative spirit, communication and management skills, compassion and entrepreneurial mindset.
Label: Giới thiệu

information: Transforming thinking, enriching intellectual-economic life and professional activities through community services and contributing to society and the economy through applied research and technology transfer for a sustainable economy with a higher standard of living.
Label: Giới thiệu

information: Transforming the thinking of learners, graduates, officials and workers through quality training and applied research to enrich people's lives and professional activities in Vietnam for a sustainable economy and higher living standards. Professional activities include an individual's occupation, a profession, any trade or business activity or the construction and operation of a business.
Label: Giới thiệu

information: The new brand identity of Industrial University of Ho Chi Minh City (IUH) is designed according to the philosophy of modernity - inheritance - development, reflecting the traditional identity and future vision of the school.
Label: Giới thiệu

information: The stylized "I" symbol represents both "Industrial" - the historical foundation, and "Innovation" - the mission of innovation, combined with a solid shape and a characteristic green-yellow color palette, symbolizing knowledge, aspiration and sustainable development.
Label: Giới thiệu

information: The image of three arrows pointing up represents three core values ​​Innovation - Unity - Humanity, closely linked in the modern whole. The first arrow is in the shape of a plane taking off, symbolizing youthful ambition and the journey to reach knowledge.
Label: Giới thiệu

information: The three arrows simultaneously shape the three letters I - U - H, affirming the brand identity, pioneering spirit and strategic vision of innovation - creativity - sustainable development.
Label: Giới thiệu

information: The image of three arrows pointing up represents three core values ​​Innovation - Unity - Humanity, closely linked in the modern whole. The first arrow is in the shape of a plane taking off, symbolizing youthful ambition and the journey to reach knowledge. In the layout, three arrows simultaneously shape the three letters I - U - H, affirming the brand identity, pioneering spirit and strategic vision of innovation - creativity - sustainable development.
Label: Giới thiệu

Label: Giới thiệu

Label: Giới thiệu

information: Department of Organization - Administration, Ho Chi Minh City University of Industry was established on the basis of Department of Organization - Administration, School of Technical Workers 4 and Department of Organization - Administration, College of Industry IV on January 11, 2005 according to Decision No. 06/QD-TCHC. Department of Organization and Administration, Ho Chi Minh City University of Industry is a unit with a stable formation and development process associated with the tradition of more than 60 years of formation and development of the University.
Label: Giới thiệu

information: The mission of the Organization and Administration Department is Internal Political Protection: Carrying out political security and internal protection, self-defense and national defense, labor safety, fire protection; Resolve the school's internal and external affairs; Take care of working conditions and serve school leaders.
Label: Giới thiệu

information: The Department of Finance and Accounting of Ho Chi Minh City University of Industry was established in 1976. In 2008, it was renamed the Department of Financial Planning. In 2011, the name was changed to Finance - Accounting Department.
Label: Giới thiệu

information: The functions and tasks of the Finance and Accounting Department are to advise and assist the Principal in organizing and implementing the management and use of funding sources, synthesizing and proposing opinions, and organizing the implementation of the University's financial and accounting work.
Label: Giới thiệu

information: The functions and tasks of the Finance - Accounting Department are to manage all financial revenues and expenditures in accordance with current law; cash funds, bank deposits, treasury; facilities and financial operations. Develop short-term and long-term financial plans.
Label: Giới thiệu

information: The functions and tasks of the Finance - Accounting Department are to guide and inspect financial activities at affiliated units; Control purchases, repairs, and construction; Compile reports on the School's annual financial performance and submit them to the Principal and the Ministry of Industry and Trade for approval.
Label: Giới thiệu

information: The team of the Department of Finance and Accounting includes 13 officers and employees of the Department (1 Head of Department cum Chief Accountant, 1 Deputy Head of Department and 11 specialists and staff) including 6 masters. Advanced political theory: 1 person, Intermediate political theory: 1 person
Label: Giới thiệu
